description:
This image displays a screenshot of the "General Information" dialog box used for adding a new data "Extraction" within the Copernicus Land Monitoring Service (CLMS) CLC+ Core application. The dialog presents several input fields and their pre-filled values for defining extraction parameters.
The fields shown are:
- "Name *": "CLC+ Instance_LULUCF_2021_NL"
- "Country *": "NL Netherlands/Nederland"
- "Region": "NL11 Groningen"
- "Reference Year *": "2018"
- "Time Range of Extracted Data *": "01.01.2018 – 31.12.2018", accompanied by the descriptive text "The time range of when the data was produced."
- "INSPIRE Themes *": Currently selected themes are "LC Land cover" and "LU Land use". A hyperlink labeled "INSPIRE theme register" is provided for further details on Infrastructure for Spatial Information in the European Community (INSPIRE) themes.
- "Created By": "User Admin/Support CLC+ Core" (displayed as a clickable link)
- "Organisation/s *": "European Environment Agency" (EEA)
Asterisks indicate mandatory fields. At the top right of the dialog, "CANCEL" and "SAVE" action buttons are visible. The populated fields specify an extraction related to Land Use, Land-Use Change and Forestry (LULUCF) data for the Netherlands, focusing on the Groningen region, with a reference year and data production time range of 2018.
